candidates.why: This D&A summary row appears in the operating-expense section below gross profit and alongside SG&A-type operating expense lines, not within or alongside the selected COGS bucket above gross profit.
Component of the operating-expense D&A summary; not specific to COGS and should not be added separately when a summary row exists.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Cost of revenues/COGS' above gross profit. All visible D&A rows are presented later within operating expenses, so they should not be added to COGS.

candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A summary row shown at the same level as the selected operating expense components. Since the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows exclude this line, it should be added separately to avoid understating SG&A-type operating costs.
Looks like a component of 'Amortisation and depreciation'; do not select separately when the summary row exists.
Looks like a component of the D&A summary and should not be added separately if the summary row is chosen.
Sub-component of amortisation beneath the broader D&A grouping; avoid double counting.
Component of the broader D&A summary row; avoid double counting.
Balancing row, not a standalone operating expense to add.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket contains Capitalised development costs, Marketing expenses, Personnel expenses, and Other external expenses, but not the explicit same-level row 'Amortisation and depreciation'. The D&A summary should therefore be added separately. Component D&A rows are excluded to avoid double counting.
